title: Anonymous Juggernaut
description: This plugin adds a command that lets you make someone's chat, join, leave, kill, tab, achievement, and nametag &k123 This also sets their skin to mugm_'s
body:
# 🕶️ Anonymous Juggernaut

**Unleash chaos and anonymity on your Minecraft server.**

Anonymous Juggernaut is a powerful trolling plugin that lets you completely distort a player’s identity using the ```&k``` obfuscation effect. Once activated, the player becomes unreadable and unrecognizable across nearly every part of the server.

## 🔧 Features:

- Obfuscates chat messages
- Scrambles join and leave messages
- Hides identity in kill messages
- Glitches names in the tab list
- Obfuscates advancements/achievement messages
- Applies to nametags in-game
- Sets the player’s skin to mugm_ for maximum confusion

Whether you're pranking friends, running events, or adding a mysterious gameplay element, this plugin delivers pure chaos with a single command.

**⚡ Become unknown. Become unstoppable.**
